title: Poppy PlayCraft
description: Mod adds content from Poppy Playtime
body:
Modification add content from Poppy Playtime from Mob Entertainment.
Mod not full completed, we still working.
We have:
Huggy Wuggy - evil human-monster from chapter 1
Poppy - daughter of Eliot Ludwig in doll body, first successful experiment
And more items & blocks
